Video.summary: Tony is threatened with criminal negligence after the son of a prominent lawyer hangs himself in his cell.
Video.title: In The Best Of Families

Video.summary: While on the trail of an arsonist, the commish notices that all the clues point to the wife's father.
Video.title: Redemption, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall go undercover at an exclusive resort to find a blackmailer's killer.
Video.title: The Biggest Man In Town

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue a security guard turned thief as he searches for the money he stole and lost.
Video.title: Million Dollar Misunderstanding

Video.summary: When Nick Colette, the hot-headed son of a "retired" mobster Tommy Colette, joins forces with his father, Eastbridge's crime troubles start.
Video.title: Family Business

Video.summary: Following the death of his gangster son in a police shootout, mobster Tommy Colette vows to kill Tony Scali himself.
Video.title: Out Of Business

Video.summary: A millionaire is nearly killed, his wife the prime suspect, until she's murdered.
Video.title: Rich Girl

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali and his team of officers pull out all stops as they try to beat the clock in a desperate search for the kidnapper of a very sick baby.
Video.title: The Sharp Pinch

Video.summary: Tony suspects foul play when a member of a commando-like squad of elite prep-school students -- perpetrators of a series of break-in thefts -- disappears.
Video.title: Dead Cadet's Society

Video.summary: Tony joins a video-dating service when he suspects one of his clients is a murderous thief. Also, Stan tries to protect Carmela from a calirvoyant's curse.
Video.title: The Heart's A Lonely Sucker

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall witness a string of murders when they're assigned as technical advisers for a tv show.
Video.title: Killer In The Halloween Mask

Video.summary: Against departmental orders, Hunter goes to South America to stalk a diplomat who raped McCall.
Video.title: Rape And Revenge, Part 2

Video.summary: When McCall is raped by a South American diplomat immune from prosecution, Hunter follows him to his homeland.
Video.title: Rape And Revenge, Part 1

Video.summary: After Tony's expensive new automobile is stolen from him at gunpoint, he and Cyd clash over the best way to capture Eastbridge's busiest carjackers.
Video.title: Stoned

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the murder of an up-and-coming young tennis champ's stepfather.
Video.title: Love-15

Video.summary: Chris and Rita pose as an engaged couple and attend a sex therapy clinic.
Video.title: Soul Kiss

Video.summary: The murder of a wealthy woman points toward her estranged husband.
Video.title: Irreconcilable Differences

Video.summary: The murder of a wealthy Guatemalan businessman takes on serious international implications.
Video.title: Scorpio Lover

Video.summary: Two brothers are suspected of brutally murdering their parents.
Video.title: Bad Blood

Video.summary: Chris poses as a beauty pageant judge to find out who brutally murdered the pageant's most recent queen.
Video.title: The Queen Is Dead

Video.summary: Chris and Rita discover that a deranged woman planning to kill her lover is part of an elaborate scheme.
Video.title: Was It Good For You Too?

Image.alt: Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?
Was It Good For You Too?

Video.summary: An investment advisors murder implicates his wife, a mistress and his personal trainer.
Video.title: Dead Weight

Video.summary: The romance between a devious 17 year old girl and a doctor gets out of hand when she murders his wife.
Video.title: Kid Stuff

Video.summary: A couple finds themselves in big trouble when their bizarre sex games go awry and a man is killed.
Video.title: Night Games

Video.summary: Rita goes undercover for the FBI to break up an international white slavery ring.
Video.title: Meat Market

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the drug overdose of a supposedly reformed addict.
Video.title: Giant Steps

Video.summary: Chris and Rita confront a bizarre burglary ring involving the mob, murder and Chris' quirky snitch Dunn.
Video.title: Hot Rocks
